mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{balance}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, balance = #{balance}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, email, phone, balance, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
